_comment: Pinned micromamba release + per-subdir SHA256 of the micro.mamba.pm .tar.bz2 archive.
REQUIRES the sha256 here to match before it copies the binary into resources/bin — an unpinned
or unverified binary is a supply-chain risk because it is signed/notarized with the app.
IMPORTANT: micro.mamba.pm re-packages the release, so its archive hash differs from the plain
GitHub release tarball. Hash the micro.mamba.pm archive itself, NOT the GitHub .sha256 files.
To repin (bump `version`, then regenerate every digest below):
ver=2.8.1   # micro.mamba.pm uses the bare X.Y.Z, not the GitHub `X.Y.Z-0` tag
for s in osx-arm64 osx-64 linux-64 linux-aarch64 win-64; do
The sha256 covers the downloaded .tar.bz2 archive (before extraction).
Before accepting a micromamba bump, revalidate the Windows managed-runtime fixtures for multi-cache search, URL-derived cache layout, and flat-cache fallback with LongPathsEnabled=0.
